name: hubspot-mcp
description: Every HubSpot Sales Hub feature, plus offline cross-object queries, property-change-history reporting, and an agent-native data layer no other HubSpot tool has.

hubspot_access_token.title: HUBSPOT_ACCESS_TOKEN
hubspot_access_token.description: Sets HUBSPOT_ACCESS_TOKEN for the HubSpot MCP server. Get a credential from https://app.hubspot.com/private-apps.
